revenue_recognition.method: Revenue recognized when earned and due per franchise agreements
revenue_recognition.initial_fees: Recognized when substantially all initial services are performed, generally upon execution of franchise agreement
revenue_recognition.royalties: Recognized as earned, with provision for estimated uncollectible amounts
revenue_recognition.renewal_fees: Recognized as contract liability when renewal agreement becomes effective, then recognized ratably over renewal period
revenue_recognition.basis: Majority of revenue recognition is based on goods or services transferred over time (ASC 606)

depreciation_amortization.notes: Minimal fixed assets — company is asset-light

cash_equivalents.definition: Money market accounts with maturity at acquisition of less than 90 days

receivables.method: Recorded at invoiced amount; allowance based on management assessment of collectibility
receivables.notes: Company does not accrue interest on uncollectible receivables. Does not sell receivables.

contract_liabilities.description: Nonrefundable collections for area development plans not yet formalized, convention sponsorships, and other contract obligations
contract_liabilities.notes: Revenue recognized when related service is rendered

income_taxes.method: Allocated share of parent YESCO's consolidated tax return
income_taxes.treatment: Company is single-member LLC included in YESCO consolidated return
income_taxes.allocation_basis: Company's share of pre-tax income or loss
income_taxes.examination_status: YESCO not subject to federal/state examination for years before 2021
income_taxes.notes: Company does not pay income taxes directly

leases.status: No leases qualify under this standard

use_of_estimates.description: Estimates and assumptions regarding reported amounts of assets/liabilities, contingent assets/liabilities, and revenue/expenses

fair_value.instruments: Cash, accounts receivable, accounts payable, advances
fair_value.method: Carrying amounts approximate fair value due to short-term maturities

note_2_franchising.description: Franchise agreement terms and revenue recognition for franchise operations
note_2_franchising.renewal_fee_recognition: Contract liability, ratably over renewal period
note_2_franchising.direct_costs: Charged to G&A as incurred; renewal costs may be capitalized to prepaid
note_2_franchising.yesco_national_service: Division of YESCO LLC serving national customers through centralized coordination

note_3_initial_fees_receivable.notes: New in 2024. No special financing. Expected collection early 2025. No past due or nonaccrual.

note_5_employee_benefits.plan_type: 401(k) profit sharing retirement plan and trust

note_6_related_party.purpose: Affiliate acts as agent in paying bills and collecting some receivables of the Company
note_6_related_party.risk_assessment: Represents 78% of total assets. No repayment schedule. Growing approximately $1.5M/year. Material concentration risk.

note_7_commitments_contingencies.management_assessment: Not expected to have material impact on financial position, results, or liquidity

impairment_policy: Not explicitly stated — minimal fixed assets
